title: NATO Ankara Summit and Ukraine Air Defense Requests
summary: Ukraine seeks increased air defense support from NATO allies at their Ankara summit while facing ongoing Russian missile and drone attacks on cities.

events.chapter_summary: Russia launched a major missile and drone attack on Kyiv on July 6, 2026, killing at least 22 people, timed days before a NATO summit in Ankara where Ukraine's air defense needs are set to be discussed.

Zelensky met with Trump at the Ankara summit and discussions advanced toward a potential Patriot missile licensing deal for Ukraine, while Russian strikes killed more than 50 civilians in recent attacks on Kyiv.
